reviews.comment:
Cálido, variedad de productos, espacio para descanso arbolado, baños limpios, juegos, amable atención, amplio estacionamiento y precios con descuentos para socios del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Warm, variety of products, shaded rest area, clean restrooms, games, friendly service, ample parking and discounted prices for ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaGZyak9REAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar agradable para un descanso en medio de la ruta... buena atencion y los baños siempre limpios...

(Translated by Google)
A pleasant place for a break along the way... good service and the bathrooms are always clean...

reviews.comment:
Techo roto caía agua alado de la caja y de los alimentos

(Translated by Google)
The roof was broken; water was dripping onto the side of the box and the food.

reviews.comment:
Mucha gente. Baños sucios pero hay mesitas para estar un rato al aire libre.

(Translated by Google)
Lots of people. Dirty bathrooms but there are tables to sit outside for a while.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Genial! Muy cuidado y familiar. Lo pasamos muy lindo y sin ser socios. Justo pasamos por ahí a descansar un poco

(Translated by Google)
Fantastic! Very well-maintained and family-friendly. We had a lovely time, even though we weren't members. We just happened to be passing by to relax for a bit.
